title: crossplane/create-subnet input
description: Input Contract for the crossplane/create-subnet Action (ADR-0059): the targetless builder an Intent/Subnet launches. It server-side-applies the named Crossplane resource (GVR + spec, opaque per §1.5 — a provider-kubernetes Object in dev, a provider-aws Subnet in prod), waits for Ready, and projects the subnet back. The projectKind + projectLabels (incl. the stratt.intent/singleton correlation key) ride the Run-provenance projection so the provisioning Finding resolves.

group.description: The Crossplane resource API group, e.g. kubernetes.crossplane.io.

resource.description: The plural resource name, e.g. objects.

name.description: The resource + subnet name (the crossplane.claim identity).

spec.description: The Crossplane resource spec (opaque, §1.5 — never typed per-provider here).

cidr.description: The subnet CIDR to project as net.subnet when the resource doesn't surface it at status.cidr.

projectKind.description: Estate overlay: the Entity kind the built subnet projects AS (default subnet).

projectLabels.description: Estate overlay labels on the Run-provenance projection — the stratt.intent/singleton correlation key resolves the provisioning Finding.
